character.definition: (same as 搨) to take a rubbing of an inscription on stone, etc., (same as 拉) to pull; to drag; to hold, to beat; to strike; to attack, (same as 拹) to break; to destroy; to smash
(same as 箑) a fan, (same as 翣) feathers adorning a coffin, bamboo ware
old, wrinkles; creases, ashamed, shamed-faced look
(ancient form of 饐) cooked food which has become mouldy, sour
to induce to come; to encourage

variants.raw_value: 戚	戚 慼 鏚

character.definition: coins, money, wealth; (Cant.) 鏹水, sulfuric acid
